creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: cs
Date: Wed Jul 18 21:39:17 2012
New Revision: 301130
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/301130

Log:
  - Update to 1.1.0
  - Update maintainer e-mail
  
  PR:		ports/169899
  Submitted by:	Hrant Dadivanyan <ran@styx.aic.net>
  Approved by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/dns/zkt/Makefile
  head/dns/zkt/distinfo

Modified: head/dns/zkt/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/dns/zkt/Makefile	Wed Jul 18 21:03:43 2012	(r301129)
+++ head/dns/zkt/Makefile	Wed Jul 18 21:39:17 2012	(r301130)
@@ -1,27 +1,30 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:   zkt
 # Date created:        2008-08-06
-# Whom:                Frank Behrens <frank+ports@ilse.behrens.de>
+# Whom:                Frank Behrens
 #
 # $FreeBSD$
 #
 
 PORTNAME=		zkt
-DISTVERSION=		1.0
+DISTVERSION=		1.1.0
 CATEGORIES=		dns
-MASTER_SITES=		SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}-${DISTVERSION} \
-			http://www.hznet.de/dns/zkt/
+MASTER_SITES=		http://www.hznet.de/dns/zkt/
 
-MAINTAINER=		frank+ports@ilse.behrens.de
+MAINTAINER=		frank@harz2014.behrens.de
 COMMENT=		Tool to manage keys and signatures for DNSSEC-zones
 
 DIR_NAMED_CONF?=	/etc/namedb
 
-PLIST_FILES=		sbin/dnssec-zkt \
-			sbin/dnssec-signer \
+PLIST_FILES=		sbin/zkt-conf \
+			sbin/zkt-keyman \
+			sbin/zkt-ls \
+			sbin/zkt-signer \
 			sbin/zkt-soaserial
 MAN8=			dnssec-zkt.8 \
-			zkt-signer.8 \
-			zkt-keyman.8
+			zkt-conf.8 \
+			zkt-keyman.8 \
+			zkt-ls.8 \
+			zkt-signer.8
 GNU_CONFIGURE=		yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-configpath=${DIR_NAMED_CONF}
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=		yes
@@ -32,11 +35,15 @@ post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/var/named/|${DIR_NAMED_CONF}/|g' ${WRKSRC}/man/*.8
 
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/dnssec-zkt ${PREFIX}/sbin/
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/dnssec-signer ${PREFIX}/sbin/
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/zkt-conf ${PREFIX}/sbin/
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/zkt-keyman ${PREFIX}/sbin/
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/zkt-ls ${PREFIX}/sbin/
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/zkt-signer ${PREFIX}/sbin/
 	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/zkt-soaserial ${PREFIX}/sbin/
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/dnssec-zkt.8 ${PREFIX}/man/man8/
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/zkt-signer.8 ${PREFIX}/man/man8/
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/zkt-conf.8 ${PREFIX}/man/man8/
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/zkt-keyman.8 ${PREFIX}/man/man8/
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/zkt-ls.8 ${PREFIX}/man/man8/
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/zkt-signer.8 ${PREFIX}/man/man8/
 
 .include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Modified: head/dns/zkt/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/dns/zkt/distinfo	Wed Jul 18 21:03:43 2012	(r301129)
+++ head/dns/zkt/distinfo	Wed Jul 18 21:39:17 2012	(r301130)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (zkt-1.0.tar.gz) = 70087a6fe6be1d5af6dca1843a37506ad27fff16d862b7883775400228bd03e2
-SIZE (zkt-1.0.tar.gz) = 331260
+SHA256 (zkt-1.1.0.tar.gz) = 887e04ce5aa85d84af57852794d2388cbd67516a5e5c9fcd1b8270d2f41e7a26
+SIZE (zkt-1.1.0.tar.gz) = 343811
